news.t: Here’s how to use ETFs to prepare for a Biden presidency

holdings.infoBox: IUSV is an equity ETF with a total of 747 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 6.91%, Amazon.com at 3.54%, Exxon Mobil at 1.99%, Intel at 1.89%, and Walmart at 1.72%.

overview.description: The iShares Core S&P US Value ETF (IUSV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 900 Value index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap value stocks in the US. The index selects from stocks ranked 1-3000 by market-cap based on 3 value factors. IUSV was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Here’s how to use ETFs to prepare for a Biden presidency
data.text: It could be "Infrastructure Week" for four years if the Democratic contender takes the White House. Here's how to invest for that possibility.

data.title: Top Value ETFs For September
data.text: While many are concerned about overinflated valuations, our deep learning algorithms have identified several U.S. Value ETFs based on the weekly flows this month.
